infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: SayCart uses speech recognition so you can add groceries and prices by voice.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SayCart uses the microphone to capture your voice for item and price entry.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SayCart to use the microphone for voice entry.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow SayCart to use speech recognition for voice entry.
